dj_text: Jeg Er Sulten is dead. Alt Er Godt killed it. Justice served cold. One more left in the queue.
commercial_text: You've stumbled onto Nostalgia Overload Radio from the Timeline That Wasn't.

recovery_text: The frequency is ours again. If you heard whispering from the void, ignore it.
title: Alt Er Godt
